_meta.title: CNAP methodology reference data - PRD scope (FR-4 question bank)
_meta.scope: PRD FR-1..FR-11 only. Rio-superset columns and sheets excluded - see README.md.
NOT_SUPPLIED: questions[].weight - the 'Question Bank' sheet has no weight column; 'Priority Scoring' lists all 9 factors as the literal word 'Configurable'. PRD s7 input #1.
questions[].scoringLookup - the 0-100 severity value per answer option is not in this workbook. PRD s7 input #1 / FR-7.

questions[].reportTypes - the sheet's 'Report Mapping' column holds only 'Individual + Collective' (102) / 'Qualitative clustering' (2); it does NOT map to the PRD's three report types (Top 5 Needs / Gender-Wise / Rural Community). PRD s7 input #1 / FR-9.

questions.kpi: % of villages with a basic health facility within 5 km
questions.text: Is there a functioning health facility (clinic/health center) within 5 km of this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: Average distance to nearest functioning health facility (km)
questions.text: Approximately how far (in km) is it from the village center to the nearest functioning health facility?
questions.optionsRaw: Open numeric value (km)

questions.kpi: % of the year the nearest facility is functioning (not closed/under-staffed)
questions.text: In the last 12 months, was the nearest health facility ever closed or without adequate staff for more than two consecutive weeks?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households reporting transport as a barrier to healthcare access
questions.text: Does the lack of transport prevent household members from reaching health services when needed?
questions.optionsRaw: Always / Often / Sometimes / Never

questions.kpi: % of pregnant women who received 4+ antenatal visits
questions.text: Among women in this household who were pregnant in the last two years, did they receive at least 4 antenatal check-ups?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, all of them / Some of them / None of them / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of births attended by a skilled health worker
questions.text: Was the most recent birth in this household attended by a doctor, nurse, or trained midwife?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of children under 5 who completed the immunization schedule
questions.text: Have all children under 5 in this household received all scheduled vaccinations?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, all / Partially / None / No children under 5

questions.kpi: % of children under 5 under regular growth/nutrition monitoring
questions.text: Are children under 5 in this household weighed and growth-monitored regularly at a health facility?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, regularly / Sometimes / Never / No children under 5

questions.kpi: % of households with at least one member with a diagnosed chronic condition
questions.text: Does any member of this household have a diagnosed chronic condition (diabetes, hypertension, etc.)?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of individuals with chronic illness able to access regular follow-up care
questions.text: If yes, can this individual access regular follow-up care/medication for the condition locally?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, easily / Yes, with difficulty / No / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of households that know available psychosocial support channels
questions.text: Do you know where to seek help if a household member needs psychological or social support?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: Perceived community stigma toward seeking psychological support
questions.text: How comfortable are members of this community in seeking psychological support openly?
questions.optionsRaw: Very uncomfortable / Uncomfortable / Neutral / Comfortable / Very comfortable

questions.kpi: % of households rating health service quality as adequate or higher
questions.text: How do you rate the overall quality of health services available to this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Very poor / Poor / Fair / Good / Very good

questions.kpi: % of households reporting consistent availability of essential medicines
questions.text: When visiting the local health facility, are essential/prescribed medicines usually available?
questions.optionsRaw: Always / Usually / Rarely / Never

questions.kpi: % of households reporting healthcare cost as a barrier
questions.text: Did the cost of healthcare (consultation, medicine, transport) prevent this household from seeking needed care in the past year?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, often / Yes, sometimes / No

questions.kpi: Perceived adequacy of emergency medical response time
questions.text: In a medical emergency, approximately how long does it take for help to arrive (ambulance/transfer to facility)?
questions.optionsRaw: Under 30 min / 30-60 min / 1-2 hours / Over 2 hours / No emergency service

questions.kpi: % of school-age children (6-15) currently enrolled
questions.text: Are all school-age children (6-15) in this household currently enrolled in school?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, all / Some / None / No school-age children

questions.kpi: Average distance to nearest primary school (km)
questions.text: Approximately how far is it from this household to the nearest primary school?
questions.optionsRaw: Open numeric value (km)

questions.kpi: % of households reporting safe, reliable transport to school
questions.text: Do children in this household have safe, reliable transport to and from school?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / Partially / No / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of households reporting a child dropping out in the past two years
questions.text: Has any school-age child in this household stopped attending in the past two years?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: Most frequently cited reasons for school dropout
questions.text: If yes, what was the main reason for leaving school? (financial / distance / safety / early marriage / work / disability / other)
questions.optionsRaw: Financial / Distance / Safety / Early marriage / Work / Disability / Learning difficulty / Other

questions.kpi: Girls-to-boys enrolment ratio (school age)
questions.text: Are there school-age girls in this household not enrolled while boys of the same age are enrolled?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of households perceiving specific barriers to girls' education
questions.text: What barriers, if any, do girls in this village face in continuing their education that boys do not?
questions.optionsRaw: Distance/safety / Lack of female teachers / Early marriage / Domestic duties / Social customs / None

questions.kpi: % of parents satisfied with teaching quality at the local school
questions.text: How satisfied are you with the quality of teaching at the school your children attend?
questions.optionsRaw: Very dissatisfied / Dissatisfied / Neutral / Satisfied / Very satisfied

questions.kpi: % of schools perceived to have adequate teaching staff
questions.text: Does the local school have enough teachers to cover all subjects/grades?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / Partially / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households reporting children receive adequate books and materials
questions.text: Do your children receive the books and learning materials they need for their grade level?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, fully / Partially / No

questions.kpi: % of schools with adequate classrooms, water, and sanitation
questions.text: Does the school your children attend have enough classrooms, clean water, and functioning toilets?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, all adequate / Some inadequate / Mostly inadequate / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of schools with functioning computers/internet for students
questions.text: Does the school have functioning computers or internet available for student use?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of youth aware of and able to access vocational/technical training
questions.text: Are vocational or technical training programs available and accessible to youth in this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, accessible / Exist but not accessible / None / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of adult individuals unable to read/write functionally
questions.text: Are there adults in this household who are unable to read or write?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.indicator: Access to a Safe Water Source
questions.kpi: % of households reached by an improved drinking water source
questions.text: What is the main source of drinking water for this household?
questions.optionsRaw: Piped to dwelling / Public tap / Protected well / Unprotected well / Surface water (river/pond) / Tanker/vendor / Other

questions.kpi: Average round-trip water collection time (minutes)
questions.text: How long does a round trip take to collect water from the main source, if not piped to the home?
questions.optionsRaw: Water on premises / Under 30 min / 30 min-1 hour / Over 1 hour

questions.kpi: % of households reporting year-round water availability
questions.text: Is the main water source available continuously year-round, including the dry season?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, continuously / Seasonal shortage / Frequent shortage / Rarely available

questions.kpi: % of households perceiving their drinking water as safe
questions.text: Does this household consider its drinking water safe to drink without treatment?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No, needs treatment / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households practicing water treatment before drinking
questions.text: Does this household treat water (boiling, filtering, chlorination) before drinking?
questions.optionsRaw: Always / Sometimes / Never

questions.kpi: % of households reporting waterborne illness in the past 6 months
questions.text: Has any household member had an illness suspected to be linked to water quality in the past 6 months (e.g., diarrhea)?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households reached by improved sanitation facilities
questions.text: What type of toilet facility does this household primarily use?
questions.optionsRaw: Flush/piped or septic / Pit with slab / Shared/public facility / Pit without slab / Open defecation

questions.kpi: % of households reporting the toilet facility is private and safe, especially at night
questions.text: Is this household's toilet facility private and safe to use, even at night?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / Somewhat / No

questions.kpi: % of households with a handwashing facility with water and soap
questions.text: Does this household have a handwashing facility with both water and soap?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / Water only, no soap / No facility

questions.kpi: % of villages with a regular solid waste collection service
questions.text: Is there a regular waste collection service operating in this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, weekly or more / Yes, irregularly / No service

questions.kpi: Primary waste disposal method in the absence of formal collection
questions.text: In the absence of formal collection, how does this household primarily dispose of its waste?
questions.optionsRaw: Burning / Burying / Open dumping / Private collection / Other

questions.kpi: % of households connected to the national electricity grid
questions.text: Is this household connected to the national electricity grid?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No, uses an alternative source / No electricity access

questions.kpi: Average daily hours of electricity outage
questions.text: On a typical day, how many hours is the electricity supply cut off?
questions.optionsRaw: No outage / Under 2 hours / 2-6 hours / Over 6 hours / No grid connection

questions.kpi: % of households relying on alternative/off-grid energy sources
questions.text: If not grid-connected, what is the household's main energy source?
questions.optionsRaw: Solar / Generator / Gas / Wood/biomass / Other / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of households using clean cooking fuel/technology
questions.text: What is the primary fuel or technology this household uses for cooking?
questions.optionsRaw: Electricity/LPG/natural gas / Improved stove / Wood/charcoal/open fire / Other

questions.kpi: % of households reporting health concerns from cooking smoke
questions.text: Do household members experience respiratory or eye irritation symptoms believed to be linked to cooking smoke?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, frequently / Sometimes / Never / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of households reporting seasonal water scarcity affecting farming/livestock
questions.text: Does this household experience water scarcity affecting farming or livestock for part of the year?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, severe / Yes, moderate / No

questions.kpi: Perceived change in land/soil quality over 5 years
questions.text: Compared to 5 years ago, how would you describe the agricultural land/soil quality in this area?
questions.optionsRaw: Improved / Same / Degraded / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households affected by a natural disaster in 3 years
questions.text: Has this household been affected by a flood, drought, or other natural disaster in the past 3 years?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of households aware of locally available environmental or clean-energy programs
questions.text: Are you aware of any environmental protection or clean-energy programs operating in or near this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of households practicing any form of water/resource conservation
questions.text: Does this household practice any form of water or resource conservation?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, regularly / Sometimes / No

questions.kpi: % of working-age individuals (15-64) currently employed or self-employed
questions.text: What is the current employment status of the main working-age household members?
questions.optionsRaw: Employed full-time / Self-employed / Employed part-time / Seeking work / Not seeking work / Unable to work

questions.kpi: % of households reporting income covers basic needs
questions.text: Does this household's income cover its basic needs (food, housing, health, education)?
questions.optionsRaw: Covers comfortably / Barely covers / Does not cover

questions.kpi: Stability/seasonality of the household's main income source year-round
questions.text: How stable is the household's main income source throughout the year?
questions.optionsRaw: Stable year-round / Seasonal and predictable / Irregular/unpredictable

questions.kpi: Number of distinct income sources the household relies on
questions.text: How many distinct income sources does this household currently rely on?
questions.optionsRaw: Three or more / Two / One / None

questions.kpi: % of households relying on farming/livestock as a primary livelihood
questions.text: Is farming, livestock, or fishing the primary livelihood for this household?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, primary / Yes, secondary / No

questions.kpi: % of farming households reporting adequate access to inputs (seeds, feed, fertilizer) and markets
questions.text: Does this household have adequate access to agricultural inputs and a market to sell its produce/livestock?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, both / Inputs only / Market only / Neither / Not applicable

questions.kpi: Most frequently cited barrier limiting agricultural productivity
questions.text: What single biggest barrier limits this household's farming/livestock productivity?
questions.optionsRaw: Water/irrigation / Land size / Input cost / Market access / Climate/weather / Lack of equipment / Lack of skills / Other

questions.kpi: % of households owning or operating a small or micro enterprise
questions.text: Does this household currently own or operate a small business or micro enterprise?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of non-owning households expressing intent to start a business
questions.text: If not currently operating a business, do members of this household wish to start one?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, with a clear idea / Yes, but no clear idea / No interest / Not applicable

questions.kpi: Most frequently cited barrier to starting/growing a business
questions.text: What is the main barrier preventing this household from starting or growing a business?
questions.optionsRaw: Lack of capital / Lack of skills/training / Lack of market / Regulatory/licensing issues / Lack of guidance / Other

questions.kpi: % of households reached by formal finance or micro-finance services
questions.text: Does this household have access to a bank account, micro-finance, or a formal loan when needed?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, easily / Yes, with difficulty / No access

questions.kpi: % of working-age individuals holding a marketable vocational/technical skill
questions.text: Do working-age household members hold a marketable vocational or technical skill (e.g., carpentry, sewing, maintenance)?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of working-age individuals who took part in a skills/training program in 2 years
questions.text: Has any working-age household member participated in a vocational or skills training program in the past two years?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of women in the household employed, self-employed, or actively seeking work
questions.text: Are the women in this household employed, self-employed, or actively seeking paid work?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No, by choice / No, due to barriers / Not applicable

questions.kpi: Primary barrier to women's economic participation, where applicable
questions.text: If women in this household face barriers to working, what is the primary barrier?
questions.optionsRaw: Childcare/domestic duties / Social/cultural customs / Lack of nearby opportunities / Transport / Lack of skills / Not applicable

questions.kpi: Extent of women's control over the income they earn
questions.text: If women in this household earn income, do they have control over how it is spent or saved?
questions.optionsRaw: Full control / Joint decision / Limited control / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of villages connected by a paved or all-season road
questions.text: Is this village connected to the main road network by a paved or all-season road?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, paved / Yes, graded/unpaved but usable / No, often impassable

questions.kpi: % of households with access to regular public/shared transport
questions.text: Is regular public or shared transport available connecting this village to nearby towns/cities?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, daily / Yes, limited schedule / No regular service

questions.kpi: % of the year the village is fully accessible by road
questions.text: Are there times of year (e.g., rainy season) when this village becomes difficult or impossible to reach by road?
questions.optionsRaw: Always accessible / Sometimes difficult / Frequently inaccessible

questions.kpi: % of households with reliable mobile network coverage
questions.text: Is mobile network coverage reliable at this household's location?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, strong signal / Weak/intermittent signal / No coverage

questions.kpi: % of households with functional internet access (mobile data or fixed line)
questions.text: Does this household have functional internet access, via mobile data or a fixed connection?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, reliable / Yes, but unreliable/slow / No access

questions.kpi: % of household members able to use a smartphone/internet for basic tasks
questions.text: Can members of this household use a smartphone or internet for basic tasks (messaging, browsing, mobile banking)?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, most members / Some members / None

questions.kpi: % of households living in structurally adequate housing
questions.text: Is the household's dwelling structurally adequate (solid roof, walls, weather protection)?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, fully adequate / Partially adequate / Inadequate

questions.kpi: Average number of persons per room in the household
questions.text: On average, how many persons share each room used for sleeping in this household?
questions.optionsRaw: Open numeric value (persons/room)

questions.kpi: % of households within a reasonable distance of a functioning market
questions.text: Is there a functioning market (to buy and sell) within a reasonable distance of this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, within the village / Yes, nearby (under 10 km) / No, distant (over 10 km)

questions.kpi: Availability of a functioning community center or public gathering space
questions.text: Does this village have a functioning community center, public square, or gathering space?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, in good condition / Yes, in poor condition / No

questions.kpi: % of households feeling safe in their village, day and night
questions.text: How safe do members of this household feel walking in this village, day and night?
questions.optionsRaw: Very unsafe / Unsafe / Neutral / Safe / Very safe

questions.kpi: % of vulnerable households reached by social protection programs
questions.text: Does this household currently receive support from any social protection or social welfare program?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No, but eligible / No, not eligible / Don't know eligibility

questions.kpi: % of elderly household members with access to adequate care/support
questions.text: Do elderly members of this household have access to adequate care, support, or social services?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / Partially / No / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of village public facilities accessible to persons with disabilities
questions.text: Are public facilities in this village (schools, health centers, public buildings) accessible to persons with disabilities?
options: No persons with disabilities in household
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, most / Partially / Not accessible / No persons with disabilities in household

questions.kpi: % of households with a member whose disability affects daily activities
questions.text: Does any member of this household have a disability that affects their daily activities?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of households that know how to report child abuse or neglect
questions.text: Do you know how or where to report a case of child abuse or neglect in this area?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of youth (15-24) participating in community or voluntary activities
questions.text: Are youth (15-24) in this household engaged in any community, voluntary, or civic activities?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, actively / Sometimes / Not engaged

questions.kpi: % of households where a member married before age 18
questions.text: Has any member of this household married before age 18?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Prefer not to answer

questions.kpi: % of households reporting a strong sense of belonging/trust within the village
questions.text: How strong is your household's sense of belonging and trust within this village community?
questions.optionsRaw: Very weak / Weak / Moderate / Strong / Very strong

questions.kpi: % of households reporting an unresolved community or land/resource dispute in the past year
questions.text: Has this household been involved in or affected by an unresolved community or land/resource dispute in the past year?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of villages with an active community group/committee addressing local issues
questions.text: Is there an active community group, council, or committee in this village addressing local needs?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, active / Exists but inactive / None

questions.kpi: % of villages with identifiable tangible or intangible heritage assets
questions.text: Does this village have cultural heritage sites, crafts, or traditions being actively recognized or preserved?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, actively preserved / Exist but undocumented/at risk / None identified

questions.kpi: Perceived risk of loss/decline of local cultural practices or sites
questions.text: Do you feel that local traditions, crafts, or heritage sites are at risk of disappearing in the next generation?
questions.optionsRaw: High risk / Some risk / Low risk / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households aware of locally available cultural, arts, or heritage programs
questions.text: Are any cultural, arts, or heritage programs/events available in or near this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households that took part in a local cultural or heritage activity in the past year
questions.text: Has any member of this household participated in a local cultural, heritage, or arts activity in the past 12 months?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: % of households expressing pride in local cultural identity/heritage
questions.text: How proud are members of this household of the cultural identity and heritage of this village?
questions.optionsRaw: Not proud at all / Slightly proud / Moderately proud / Proud / Very proud

questions.kpi: % of households actively passing traditional skills/knowledge to younger generations
questions.text: Are traditional skills, crafts, or knowledge being actively taught to younger generations in this household/community?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, actively / Somewhat / Not happening

questions.kpi: % of households reporting easy access to government service centers
questions.text: How easy is it for this household to reach government service centers (civil registry, licensing, etc.) when needed?
questions.optionsRaw: Very difficult / Difficult / Fair / Easy / Very easy

questions.kpi: % of household members holding complete civil documents (ID, birth registration)
questions.text: Do all members of this household hold complete civil documents (national ID, birth certificate, etc.)?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, all / Some missing / Don't know

questions.kpi: % of households that used at least one e-government service in 6 months
questions.text: Has this household used any digital/e-government service (e.g., online applications, digital identity platforms) in the past 6 months?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No, but aware / No, unaware of options

questions.kpi: % of households satisfied with the e-government services they used
questions.text: If used, how satisfied are you with the e-government service experience?
questions.optionsRaw: Very dissatisfied / Dissatisfied / Neutral / Satisfied / Very satisfied / Not applicable

questions.kpi: % of adults participating in any local committee, council, or association
questions.text: Do adults in this household participate in any local committee, council, or association?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes, actively / Sometimes / No

questions.kpi: Residents' perceived ability to influence village-related decisions
questions.text: Do residents of this village feel they have a genuine opportunity to influence decisions affecting the village?
questions.optionsRaw: No influence at all / Limited influence / Moderate influence / Strong influence / Very strong influence

questions.kpi: Level of trust in local administrative/governing bodies
questions.text: How much do you trust the local administrative or governing bodies that serve this village?
questions.optionsRaw: No trust / Low trust / Moderate trust / High trust / Very high trust

questions.kpi: % of households aware of a channel to file complaints/grievances about public services
questions.text: Do you know of a formal channel to file a complaint or grievance about public services in this area?
questions.optionsRaw: Yes / No

questions.kpi: Keyword list (clustering)
questions.text: State the most urgent community needs in your community.
questions.optionsRaw: Short answer
questions.notes: Open-ended question added at the end of the survey (Framework).

questions.kpi: Keyword list (clustering)
questions.text: What do you feel is missing and not covered by the survey?
questions.optionsRaw: Short answer
